title: Hello, world
excerpt: A tiny placeholder post while the blog takes shape.
body:
This is a static blog powered by a JSON file and a small script. Each entry has an id, title, date, optional excerpt, and body text.

Paragraphs are separated by blank lines. Swap this copy for something real whenever you like.

title: Process notes
excerpt: Short notes on how work actually gets done.
body:
Another sample post. Use the same pattern in blog-posts.json: add an object, keep ids unique, and use the date field for sorting (newest first in the list).

Link to a post with blog.html#process-notes.
